---
title: "Quantitative Microbial Risk Assessment from Vancomycin‑resistant Enterococcus faecalis and Enterococcus faecium from a specific neighbourhood in Dhaka City,Bangladesh"
type: "conference"
author: "Nayeem,M.U.,Mrittika,M.A.,Hossain, M.J., Azad,A.K.,Ferdous,J.,Ahmed,S.,Sanyal,S.K., Towhid,S.T"
year: "2023"
publication: "36th BSM Annual Conference, Bangladesh Society of Microbiologists"
preprint: ""
doi: ""
materials: "publications/conference/TowhidST_BSM2023.pdf"
toc: false
categories:
  - Conference
---

## Abstract
